# Tailwind CSS Project

This is a Tailwind CSS project for building responsive web interfaces.

## Project Setup

- Tailwind CSS configured for HTML, CSS, and utilities
- PostCSS integration for processing Tailwind directives
- Development and production build scripts

## Quick Start

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start development server: `npm run dev`
3. Build for production: `npm run build`

## Project Structure

```
├── src/
│   ├── css/
│   │   └── input.css (Tailwind directives)
│   ├── images/ (Your image assets)
│   │   └── .gitkeep
│   └── index.html
├── dist/
│   ├── css/
│   │   └── output.css (Compiled Tailwind CSS)
│   ├── images/ (Copied image assets)
│   └── index.html
├── package.json
├── tailwind.config.js
└── postcss.config.js
```
